ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1998-1999) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "source_publication" TEXT /* Publication source of the data */,
  "source_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "source_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the season was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the season was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "specimens_tested" INTEGER /* Total number of specimens tested */,
  "total_positive" INTEGER /* Total number of positive cases */,
  "positive_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of positive cases */,
  "h3n2_positive" INTEGER /* Number of H3N2 positive cases */,
  "h3n2_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of H3N2 positive cases */,
  "h1n1_positive" INTEGER /* Number of H1N1 positive cases */,
  "h1n1_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of H1N1 positive cases */,
  "a_total_subtyped" INTEGER /* Total number of subtyped influenza A cases */,
  "a_total_unsubtyped" INTEGER /* Total number of unsubtyped influenza A cases */,
  "a_total" INTEGER /* Total number of influenza A cases */,
  "a_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of influenza A cases */,
  "b_vic_positive" INTEGER /* Number of B/Victoria positive cases */,
  "b_vic_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of B/Victoria positive cases */,
  "b_yam_positive" INTEGER /* Number of B/Yamagata positive cases */,
  "b_yam_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of B/Yamagata positive cases */,
  "b_total_subtyped" INTEGER /* Total number of subtyped influenza B cases */,
  "b_total_unsubtyped" INTEGER /* Total number of unsubtyped influenza B cases */,
  "b_total" INTEGER /* Total number of influenza B cases */,
  "b_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of influenza B cases */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality flags (e.g., 'good', 'poor', 'missing') */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain (e.g., H3N2, H1N1, B/Victoria, B/Yamagata) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strain */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of influenza (A or B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the influenza type (A or B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtype */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the influenza type */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtype (e.g., B/Victoria, B/Yamagata) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_subtypes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES influenza_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_data_regions" (
  "data_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the influenza data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "specimens_tested" INTEGER /* Total number of specimens tested in the region */,
  "total_positive" INTEGER /* Total number of positive cases in the region */,
  "positive_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of positive cases in the region */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of influenza in the region (per 100,000 population) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_regions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES influenza_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_data_strains" (
  "data_strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain-specific data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the influenza data entry */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strain */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of positive cases for the strain */,
  "positive_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of positive cases for the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_strains_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES influenza_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_strains_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES influenza_strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_data_subtypes" (
  "data_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtype-specific data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the influenza data entry */,
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subtype */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of positive cases for the subtype */,
  "positive_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of positive cases for the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_subtypes_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("subtype_id") REFERENCES influenza_subtypes ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_data_subtypes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES influenza_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, healthcare provider) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user (e.g., CDC, hospital, university) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influenza data entry accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES influenza_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health official */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the public health official */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the public health official */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the public health official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_officials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "project" TEXT /* Project the researcher is working on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "hospital" TEXT /* Hospital of the healthcare provider */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_providers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
